Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, and payment information when you donate, subscribe to our newsletter, or apply to the Coalition. We use PostHog for analytics — a sovereign, self-hosted platform that does not share your data with third parties.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to: process donations, send newsletters (twice monthly at most), respond to Coalition applications, and improve our website. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties.

Donor Privacy

Donor names may be published in our annual report or on our website. You may request complete anonymity at any time by contacting accounts@e5enclave.com. Payment data is processed by PCI-compliant Stripe and is never stored on our servers.

Cookies

We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies via PostHog to understand site usage. No advertising cookies are used.

Contact

For privacy questions: accounts@e5enclave.com

E5 Enclave

Sovereign institutional infrastructure.
Founded 2024. Liberty City, Miami.
